videos.title: Cimo finds LOVE in the Command Zone  CovertGoPodcast
videos.description:
It's total war as @VoxyTwitch and CovertGoBlue face off to see who can find the perfect commander match for @Cimoooooooo as he get's into the paper Magic The Gathering scene.
